reason: Development analysis calculated all trades but stopped before evidence output because the cooldown-matched MOM52 baseline naturally has NO_ACTION weeks while the inherited comparison helper incorrectly required a trade on every main entry date. A realized strategy-plan comparison must preserve those baseline weeks as cash rather than delete dates or invent trades.
changes: Treat only MOM52 baseline NO_ACTION dates as zero cash return in base and stress comparisons.
Retain the comparison helper's recorded count of cash-filled dates.
Do not change signals, target selection, trades, costs, gates, stages or any primary economic rule.
